//: Fabric Data Factory pipeline — ported from the sibling repo's dags/creative_intel_pipeline.py (Airflow -> Data Factory, ADR-008). Same orchestration patterns, no synchronous per-asset polling: parameterized run (client_id + drive_folder_id), Drive->Landing sync with skip-existing (cost firewall #1), ForEach over NEW assets (was Airflow .expand()), batchCount caps Gemini concurrency (was the gemini_api Pool), activity retry+backoff (was retries/retry_exponential_backoff), a Wait activity (was TimeDeltaSensorAsync), an If Condition to skip when no new assets (was AirflowSkipException). Bodies invoke the ported notebooks/scripts. RUNTIME-UNVERIFIED against a real Fabric workspace (SESSION_LOG 2026-06-24): this follows the documented Data Factory pipeline JSON shape but the exact activity schema/typeProperties must be validated on import into Fabric.
name: creative_intel_pipeline_v1

properties.description: Creative Intelligence v1 pipeline (Fabric Data Factory). Manual/triggered run with parameters; mirrors DATA_MODEL.md §8 / STACK_AND_FLOW.md §2.

client_id.//: REQUIRED — client partition under landing/ (must match seeds/dim_client.csv). Empty must fail before any OneLake write (multi-client misroute guard, matches the notebook's ValueError-on-empty).

drive_folder_id.//: Google Drive folder id to sync (blank = re-scan existing).

activities.name: sync_drive_to_landing
activities.description: Step 1 — Drive -> OneLake landing. SHA-256 content-hash naming, skip-existing (cost firewall #1). Returns count of NEW videos landed.

activities.name: list_new_assets
activities.description: Step 2 — return only asset_ids in landing whose Bronze JSON does NOT yet exist (cost firewall #2 — never re-call Gemini on an already-extracted asset).

activities.name: has_new_assets
activities.description: Skip extraction when there are no new assets (was AirflowSkipException).

ifTrueActivities.name: extract_chunks_per_asset
ifTrueActivities.description: One Gemini extraction per NEW asset (was Airflow .expand()). batchCount caps concurrency to the Gemini QPM budget (was the gemini_api Pool — the rate-limit guard).

activities.name: extract_chunks
activities.description: Gemini extraction for one asset; idempotent (re-running a processed asset is a no-op). Retry+backoff is the 429 guard.

ifTrueActivities.name: await_gemini_processing
ifTrueActivities.description: Brief settle window (was TimeDeltaSensorAsync — the deferrable async wait).

ifTrueActivities.name: build_silver
ifTrueActivities.description: Bronze -> Silver Delta tables (PySpark). Was the dbt build's Silver layer.

ifTrueActivities.name: ge_validate
ifTrueActivities.description: Run the Great Expectations suites (per-layer gates). Block promotion on CRITICAL fail.
